rationale: Elec. Code §253.006 restricts lobbyist political contributions and expenditures. It has no bearing on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: a person required to register under Chapter 305, Government Code, may not knowingly make or authorize a political contribution or political expenditure
_note: Rule text concerns lobbyist campaign finance restrictions; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
